logs.message: PANIC: could not write to file 'pg_wal/000000010000000A': No space left on device
postgres-primary: accepting connection refused — database in recovery mode after WAL write failure
FATAL: connection refused to postgres-primary.db.internal:5432 — postgres-primary unreachable
HikariPool-orders: connection pool exhausted — all 30 connections attempting reconnect to postgres-primary
order-service request timeout: upstream dependency failure cascade — postgres-primary down for 68s

summary: postgres-primary crashed due to WAL write failure (disk full); order-service connection refused cascaded to full service outage
